evals.prompt: Use $extract-project-contributions in developer mode for /Users/Jay/Documents/Dev/git/beerjoa/resume-builder-llm. Filter to recent commits by Jay and extract grounded project contribution data only.
evals.expected_output: Creates developer-mode structured evidence at experience_output.md, keeps git-grounded traceability, and excludes weak housekeeping commits.

evals.prompt: Use $extract-project-contributions in planner mode on the folder I provide that contains a PRD, weekly sync notes, and prioritization docs. Extract only the work I directly did, keep file-based locators, and do not rewrite anything into resume bullets.
evals.expected_output: Creates non-developer structured evidence at experience_output_nondeveloper.md with Evidence Source and Locator on every main row.

evals.prompt: Use $extract-project-contributions in designer mode on the folder I provide that contains slide decks, PDFs, and markdown design notes. Extract only grounded design contribution data and keep source-plus-locator traceability explicit.
evals.expected_output: Creates non-developer structured evidence at experience_output_nondeveloper.md using designer-appropriate contribution types only when explicitly supported.
